description:
Distilled from mini-plan (plan epic think-ziu; refined plan: LLMs/plans/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/2026-07-16-evidence-ledger-split/runs/20260716-120519-claude-mini/05-refined-plan.md). Spec dir: .spec/
Worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-evidence-ledger-split
Branch: specled_-csg/evidence-ledger-split

Split .spec/state.json into never-committed live-parsed cache + orphan-branch spec-evidence store keyed by tree hash. DAG: S1 -> S2 -> {S3 || S4} -> S5 -> S6. Pre-migration stages (S1-S4) carry .spec/state.json + .spec/realization_hashes.json in Allowed touches as tool-managed regen artifacts (verifiers: not scope creep). S5 untracks state.json (self-migration/dogfood).

comments.text: ORCHESTRATION START (comment mode). worker_mode=codex (team profile, 0% weekly; auto-recommended, user-confirmed). generated_state_paths=[.spec/state.json, .spec/realization_hashes.json], regen_command='mix spec.check'. DAG: .1 -> .2 -> {.3 || .4} -> .5 -> .6.

S1 baseline before specled_-csg.1 code changes:
- mix spec.check status=fail
- findings count=11 (errors=3, warnings=8)
- error codes: specled.decisions verification_command_failed; specled.tagged_tests verification_command_failed; specled.verification verification_command_failed
- warning codes: specled.evidence_store surface_target_missing x8
- shared failing test reported by command failures: test/specled_ex/verifier_test.exs:1436

LESSONS
- [other] Run mix format scoped to files you touched — tree-wide format reflows unrelated tests and trips the mechanical scope gate (from specled_-csg.1)
- [fixture-leak] When a behavior change forces edits to a fixture file outside Allowed touches, disclose it explicitly in IMPLEMENTED instead of shipping it silently (from specled_-csg.1)

MERGE GATE RED after specled_-csg.1 close: mix format --check-formatted fails on test/specled_ex/realization/implementation_test.exs. Classification: PRE-EXISTING — file is byte-identical to epic base 5912dea (unformatted @tag lists introduced on main by ab5beb6); not introduced by the merged diff. The AUDIT: BOUNCE on .1 offered "revert or explicitly authorize" the format fix; the gate failure is the authorization evidence. Action: respawning the just-closed implementer (gate-red rule) scoped to formatting this one file on the .1 stage branch, then re-merge + re-gate. DAG spawns held while gate is red.

MERGE GATE GREEN for specled_-csg.1 (post gate-fix 6372471): compile ✓, 968 tests 0 failures ✓, format ✓, deps.unlock ✓, spec.check = 0 errors + the 8 S1-baseline-adjudicated S2 evidence_store surface warnings ✓.

FLAKE ACCEPTED (#1 for signature): specled.compiler_tracer verification_command_failed / tracer_test.exs:241 under the multi-file tagged_tests run. Standalone file re-run (21 tests, 0 failures) and full spec.check re-run both green; failure does not intersect the merged diff (no compiler/tracer files touched). Caveat: original run's seed was not recoverable from spec.check output, so same-seed evidence unavailable — accepted on non-reproduction across both re-runs plus known tagged_tests timing-flakiness. Third occurrence of this signature gets an investigation ticket per policy.

MERGE GATE RED after specled_-csg.2 close: mix spec.check = 3 branch_guard_missing_subject_update ERRORs (branch_check.ex -> implementation_tier; branch_check_test.exs -> severity; implementation_test.exs -> implementation_tier, realized_by), base=origin/main, change_type=cross_cutting. Classification: REAL + deterministic, epic-cumulative ceremony unmasked by S2 — validation warnings (evidence_store surfaces) previously failed spec.check BEFORE the branch-guard stage ran; S2 fixed those warnings, so the guard now evaluates the epic's full diff vs origin/main for the first time. The changed files carry pre-existing @tag spec: references to subjects whose spec files were never co-updated in this epic. Not in S1 baseline (baseline errors were verification_command_failed only). Action: gate-forced respawn of the just-closed implementer (.2) authorized to make MINIMAL guard-satisfying co-updates to .spec/specs/implementation_tier.spec.md, realized_by.spec.md, severity.spec.md on the .2 stage branch (same authorization pattern as the .1 format fix: the gate failure is the authorization evidence). Does not consume a bounce attempt. DAG spawns held while gate is red.

MERGE GATE GREEN for specled_-csg.2 (post guard-fix 0fb4b12): compile ✓, 980 tests 0 failures ✓, format ✓, deps ✓, spec.check validation errors=0 warnings=0, branch guard errors=0 vs origin/main (informational cross_cutting classification only, non-gating, exit 0). Cumulative-diff guard debt cleared. Resuming DAG: spawning .3 and .4 in parallel.

MERGE GATE GREEN for specled_-csg.3 (4e60e97): compile ✓, 987 tests 0 failures ✓, format ✓, deps ✓, spec.check errors=0 warnings=0 (informational cross_cutting only). FLAKE ACCEPTED (#2 for signature specled.compiler_tracer verification_command_failed / tracer_test.exs:241 under multi-file tagged_tests run): standalone file re-run 21/0 and full spec.check re-run both green; does not intersect .3 diff. Per policy this signature is now AT CAP — a 3rd occurrence requires an investigation ticket and leaves the gate red. 3/6 closed; .4 in verification; .5 blocked on .4.
MERGE GATE GREEN for specled_-csg.4 (41e0257, rebase-then-ff): compile ✓, 989 tests 0 failures ✓, format ✓, deps ✓, spec.check errors=0 warnings=0. 4/6 closed. Spawning .5.

LESSONS
- [other] Run mix format scoped to files you touched — tree-wide format reflows unrelated tests and trips the mechanical scope gate (from specled_-csg.1)
- [fixture-leak] When a behavior change forces edits to a fixture file outside Allowed touches, disclose it explicitly in IMPLEMENTED instead of shipping it silently (from specled_-csg.1)
- [untested-clause] Adapt assertions to new contracts instead of deleting them — fallout edits must preserve each test's load-bearing check, and a "still passes" test that can no longer fail for its requirement is a coverage regression (from specled_-csg.5)

MERGE GATE GREEN (adjudicated) for specled_-csg.5 (7b4ab82): compile ✓, 992 tests 0 failures ✓, format ✓, deps ✓, spec.check errors=0 + exactly 1 warning (spec.system surface_target_missing .spec/state.json — the surface reference to the now-untracked state.json). ADJUDICATED expected-until-S6: .6's Allowed touches include the .spec/specs/*.spec.md prose sweep that removes narrative state.json references (spec_system named explicitly). Same adjudication pattern as the S1-baseline evidence_store warnings that S2 resolved. Self-migration landed: state.json untracked+ignored, evidence ref seeded, hook installer shipped. 5/6 closed; spawning .6 (final stage).

title: evidence-ledger-split
